ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString: DisplayMode.Edit

/*Set(varNewTestRun, 
Value(LookUp(col_TestRun,
    TestID = varSelectedTestRunID,
        TestNo)) + 0.1
); */
With(
    {
        wthParentNo: RoundDown(LookUp(col_TestRun, TestID = varSelectedTestRunID, TestNo), 0),
        wthMaxSubRun: Max(
            Filter(
                col_TestRun,
                RoundDown(TestNo, 0) = RoundDown(LookUp(col_TestRun, TestID = varSelectedTestRunID, TestNo), 0)
                && TestNo <> RoundDown(LookUp(col_TestRun, TestID = varSelectedTestRunID, TestNo), 0)
            ),
            TestNo
        )
    },
    Set(
        varNewTestRun,
        If(
            IsBlank(wthMaxSubRun) || wthMaxSubRun = 0,
            wthParentNo + 0.1,
            Round(wthMaxSubRun + 0.1, 1)
        )
    )
);


Patch(BESA_TestRuns,
                    Defaults(BESA_TestRuns),
                    {
                        'Test LookUp':      LookUp(BESA_Tests, BESA_Test = varActionRecord.BESA_Test),
                        'Test No':          varNewTestRun,
                        'Test Name':        "Run " & varNewTestRun,
                        'Test Status':      "Pending",
                        RunSelected: false,
                        PreTestData:        varDefaultTestData,
                        PostTestData:       varDefaultTestData,
                        TestMetaData:       JSON({
                                                DateTimeTest:     "",
                                                Engineer:         "",
                                                /*TestType:         If(
                                                                      varServiceTestType = "Air Permeability Test Report",
                                                                      "Depressurisation",
                                                                      "Pressurisation"
                                                                  ),*/
                                                TestType: Text(
                                                                LookUp(
                                                                    col_TestRun,
                                                                    TestNo = RoundDown(LookUp(col_TestRun, TestID = varSelectedTestRunID, TestNo), 0)
                                                                ).TestMetaData.TestType
                                                            ),
                                                EngineerLocation: "",
                                                OpeningTargetPA:  0,
                                                ClosingTargetPA:  0,
                                                PressureStep:     0,
                                                TargetPoints:     0
                                            }),
                        TempSealingData:    JSON({TempSealingStatus: "", Questions: []}),
                        EquipmentLocations: JSON([]),
                        EquipmentItems:     JSON([]),
                        SummaryResults:     JSON({})
                    }
                );

 ClearCollect(
            col_TestRun,
            ForAll(
                Filter(BESA_TestRuns, 'Test LookUp'.BESA_Test = varActionRecord.BESA_Test) As run,
                {
                    TestID:          run.BESA_TestRun,
                    TestName:        run.'Test Name',
                    RunSelected:     run.RunSelected,
                    TestNo:          run.'Test No',
                    TestStatus:      run.'Test Status',
                    TestMetaData:    ParseJSON(run.TestMetaData),
                    PreTestData:     ParseJSON(run.PreTestData),
                    PostTestData:    ParseJSON(run.PostTestData),
                    TempSealingData: ParseJSON(run.TempSealingData),
                    EquipmentLocations: If(
                        IsBlank(run.EquipmentLocations) || run.EquipmentLocations = "[]",
                        Table({Location:"", SetNumber:"", TubeIdentifier:0, Engineer:Blank(), RowNumber:1}),
                        ForAll(
                            ParseJSON(run.EquipmentLocations) As equipLoc,
                            {
                                Location:       Text(equipLoc.Location),
                                SetNumber:      Text(equipLoc.SetNumber),
                                TubeIdentifier: Value(equipLoc.TubeIdentifier),
                                Engineer:       equipLoc.Engineer,
                                RowNumber:      Value(equipLoc.RowNumber)
                            }
                        )
                    ),
                    EquipmentItems: If(
                        IsBlank(run.EquipmentItems) || run.EquipmentItems = "[]",
                        Table({SetNumber:"", SetLocationRef:0, EquipmentType:"", SerialNumber:"", Selected:false, ManometerType:"", FloorNo:0, LinkedFan:Blank(), LinkedFan_Range:Blank()}),
                        ForAll(
                            ParseJSON(run.EquipmentItems) As equipItem,
                            {
                                SetNumber:       Text(equipItem.SetNumber),
                                SetLocationRef:  Value(equipItem.SetLocationRef),
                                EquipmentType:   Text(equipItem.EquipmentType),
                                SerialNumber:    Text(equipItem.SerialNumber),
                                Selected:        Boolean(equipItem.Selected),
                                ManometerType:   Text(equipItem.ManometerType),
                                FloorNo:         Value(equipItem.FloorNo),
                                LinkedFan:       equipItem.LinkedFan,
                                LinkedFan_Range: equipItem.LinkedFan_Range
                            }
                        )
                    ),
                    SummaryResults: ParseJSON(run.SummaryResults)
                }
            )
        );

 // 8️⃣ Build col_PermTestMenu
        ClearCollect(
            col_PermTestMenu,
            {
                MenuLabel:    "Test Details",
                MenuCategory: "Test Details",
                Status:       Text(varSectionStatus.TestDetails),
                Sort:         1,
                DisplayLabel: "Test Details " & If(Text(varSectionStatus.TestDetails) = "Complete", "✓", "⚠️")
            },
            {
                MenuLabel:    "Envelope",
                MenuCategory: "Envelope",
                Status:       Text(varSectionStatus.Envelope),
                Sort:         2,
                DisplayLabel: "Envelope " & If(Text(varSectionStatus.Envelope) = "Complete", "✓", "⚠️")
            },
            {
                MenuLabel:    "Temp Sealing",
                MenuCategory: "Temp Sealing",
                Sort: 3,
                Status: Text(varSectionStatus.TempSealing),
                DisplayLabel:  "Temp Sealing " & If(Text(ParseJSON(varActionRecord.TempSealingData).TempSealingStatus) =
  "Complete", "✓", "⚠️")
                //,MenuIcon: Icon.CheckBadge  
            }
        );

        ForAll(
            col_TestRun,
            Collect(
                col_PermTestMenu,
                {
                    MenuLabel:    "Test Data - Run " & Text(ThisRecord.TestNo),
                    MenuCategory: "Test Data",
                    Status:       Text(ThisRecord.TestStatus),
                    Sort:         3 + Value(ThisRecord.TestNo),
                    DisplayLabel: If(
                                    RoundDown(ThisRecord.TestNo, 0) = ThisRecord.TestNo,
                                    "Run " & Text(ThisRecord.TestNo, "0") & " " & If(ThisRecord.TestStatus = "Complete", "✓", "⚠️"),
                                    "  ↳ Run " & Text(ThisRecord.TestNo, "0.0") & " " & If(ThisRecord.TestStatus = "Complete", "✓", "⚠️")
                                )//"Test Data - Run " & Text(ThisRecord.TestNo) & " " & If(ThisRecord.TestStatus = "Complete", "✓", "⚠️")
                }
            )
        );

        Collect(
            col_PermTestMenu,
            {
                MenuLabel:    "Report & Export",
                MenuCategory: "Report & Export",
                Status:       Text(varSectionStatus.ReportExport),
                Sort:         999,
                DisplayLabel: "Report & Export " & If(Text(varSectionStatus.ReportExport) = "Complete", "✓", "⚠️")
            }
        );

Set(
    varTestRunRecord,
    Patch(
        BESA_TestRuns,
        LookUp(BESA_TestRuns, BESA_TestRun = varSelectedTestRunID),
        {
            'Test Status': "Complete",
            SummaryResults: JSON(
                {
                    
                    Results: {
                        CL:   varTestRunResults.CL,
                        Q50:  varTestRunResults.Q50,
                        ELA:  varTestRunResults.ELA,
                        AP50: varTestRunResults.AP50,
                        R2:   varTestRunResults.R2,
                        Cenv: varTestRunResults.Cenv,
                        Exp:  varTestRunResults.Exp
                    },

                   
                    ErrorR2:                ctxDeviations.ErrorR2,
                    ErrorN:                 ctxDeviations.ErrorN,
                    ErrorGap:               ctxDeviations.ErrorGap,
                    ErrorRange:             ctxDeviations.ErrorRange,
                    Error50Pa:              ctxDeviations.Error50Pa,
                    Error100Pa:             ctxDeviations.Error100Pa,
                    ErrorMinPressure:       ctxDeviations.ErrorMinPressure,
                    ErrorNumberDataPoints:  ctxDeviations.ErrorNumberDataPoints,
                    ErrorStaticInitial:     ctxDeviations.ErrorStaticInitial,
                    ErrorStaticFinal:       ctxDeviations.ErrorStaticFinal,
                    ErrorPressureVariance:  ctxDeviations.ErrorPressureVariance,
                    ErrorFanOffReading:     ctxDeviations.ErrorFanOffReading,
                    ErrorHighBuild:         ctxDeviations.ErrorHighBuild,
                    //ErrorTempSeal:          ctxDeviations.ErrorTempSeal,
                    ErrorZone:              ctxDeviations.ErrorZone,
                    PointCount:             ctxDeviations.PointCount,
                    MaxP:                   ctxDeviations.MaxP,
                    MinP:                   ctxDeviations.MinP,
                    MaxGap:                 ctxDeviations.MaxGap,
                    MinPThreshold:          ctxDeviations.MinPThreshold,
                    MaxPThreshold:          ctxDeviations.MaxPThreshold,

                    DifferentialPressures: Table(
                            ForAll(
                                Sort(
                                    Filter(
                                        col_EquipmentLocationsItems_Display,
                                        !IsBlank(SetLocationRef),
                                        Selected,
                                        EquipmentType = "Manometer"
                                    ),
                                    ManometerType
                                ) As Manometer,
                                With(
                                    {
                                        filteredReadings: SortByColumns(
                                            Filter(
                                                col_PressureReadings,
                                                SerialNumber = Manometer.SerialNumber
                                            ),
                                            "SortOrder", SortOrder.Ascending
                                        )
                                    },
                                    {
                                        SerialNumber: Text(Manometer.SerialNumber),
                                        ManometerType: Text(Manometer.ManometerType),
                                        CL: Value(varTestRunResults.CL),
                                        Q50: Value(varTestRunResults.Q50),
                                        ELA: Value(varTestRunResults.ELA),
                                        AP50: Value(varTestRunResults.AP50),
                                        R2: Value(varTestRunResults.R2),
                                        Cenv: Value(varTestRunResults.Cenv),
                                        Exponent: Value(varTestRunResults.Exp),
                                        Readings: Table(
                                            ForAll(
                                                filteredReadings As Reading,
                                                {
                                                    SortOrder: Value(Reading.SortOrder),
                                                    PointTarget: Value(Reading.PointTarget),
                                                    PressurePointValue: Value(Reading.PressurePointValue),
                                                    PressurePointCorrectedValue: Value(Reading.PressurePointCorrectedValue),
                                                    PressurePointFanFlow: Value(Reading.PressurePointFanFlow),
                                                    ReadingActiveCalculation: Value(Reading.ReadingActiveCalculation)
                                                }
                                            )
                                        )
                                    }
                                )
                            )
                        ),

                    
                    DeviationNotes: With(
                        {d: ctxDeviations},
                        If(
                            !(d.ErrorR2 || d.ErrorN || d.ErrorGap || d.ErrorRange
                              || d.Error50Pa || d.Error100Pa || d.ErrorMinPressure
                              || d.ErrorNumberDataPoints || d.ErrorStaticInitial
                              || d.ErrorStaticFinal || d.ErrorPressureVariance
                              || d.ErrorFanOffReading || d.ErrorHighBuild
                              //|| d.ErrorTempSeal 
                              || d.ErrorZone),
                            "None",
                            Concatenate(
                                If(d.ErrorN,                 "The flow exponent is outside the theoretical limits (0.5–1.0). ", ""),
                                If(d.ErrorStaticInitial,     "Initial static pressure exceeds ±5 Pa guideline. ", ""),
                                If(d.ErrorNumberDataPoints,  "Insufficient data points recorded (minimum 7 required). ", ""),
                                If(d.ErrorStaticFinal,       "Final static pressure exceeds ±5 Pa guideline. ", ""),
                                If(d.ErrorR2,                "Correlation (r²) below 0.98 — data does not comply with test standard. ", ""),
                                If(d.ErrorGap,               "Pressure increment exceeds 10 Pa between consecutive points. ", ""),
                                If(d.Error50Pa,              "Minimum 50 Pa differential was not achieved. ", ""),
                                If(d.Error100Pa,             "Maximum pressure of " & d.MaxPThreshold & " Pa exceeded — reduce fan pressure immediately. ", ""),
                                If(d.ErrorMinPressure,       "Minimum pressure below threshold (" & Round(d.MinPThreshold, 1) & " Pa). ", ""),
                                If(d.ErrorPressureVariance,  "Building pressure variance exceeds 10% between gauges. ", ""),
                                If(d.ErrorFanOffReading,     "Not all fan-off pressure readings have been taken. ", ""),
                                If(d.ErrorRange,             "Pressure range is not greater than 30 Pa. ", ""),
                                If(d.ErrorHighBuild,         "Insufficient pressure equalisation points recorded. ", ""),
                                If(d.ErrorZone,              "Zone/sample test — 20% of envelope area required, target improved by 10%. ", "")
                                //,If(d.ErrorTempSeal,          "Temporary sealing not fully in accordance with test standard. ", "")
                            )
                        )
                    ),
                    DeviationEngineerNotes: inputEngineerDeviationNotes_1.Text,

                    
                    PressureReadings: Table(
                        ForAll(
                            col_PressureReadings As pr,
                            {
                                Value:                      pr.Value,
                                SetNumber:                  pr.SetNumber,
                                ManometerType:              pr.ManometerType,
                                SerialNumber:               pr.SerialNumber,
                                ReadingActiveCalculation:   pr.ReadingActiveCalculation,
                                PressurePointValue:         pr.PressurePointValue,
                                PressurePointCorrectedValue:pr.PressurePointCorrectedValue,
                                PressurePointFanFlow:       pr.PressurePointFanFlow,
                                CalibScaler:                pr.CalibDetails.Scaler,
                                CalibConst:                 pr.CalibDetails.Const
                            }
                        )
                    )
                }
            )
        }
    )
);


Notify("Test Run marked as complete - Generating Graph", NotificationType.Success);


Set(
    varUpdatedTestRun,
    LookUp(BESA_TestRuns, BESA_TestRun = varSelectedTestRunID)
);

UpdateIf(
    col_TestRun,
    TestID = varSelectedTestRunID,
    {
        TestStatus:     varUpdatedTestRun.'Test Status',
        SummaryResults: ParseJSON(varUpdatedTestRun.SummaryResults)
    }
);


UpdateIf(
    col_PermTestMenu,
    MenuCategory = "Test Data" && MenuLabel = "Test Data - Run " & Text(varSelectedTestNo),
    {
        Status:       "Complete",
        DisplayLabel: "Test Data - Run " & Text(varSelectedTestNo) & " ✓"
    }
);

If(CountRows(Filter(col_PressureReadings,!IsBlank(PressurePointValue)))=0,DisplayMode.Disabled,DisplayMode.Edit)
["Inside","Outside"]

    Value = varMeta_EngineerLocation

Text(ParseJSON(varActionRecord.TempSealingData).TempSealingStatus) <> "Complete"

ThisItem.'Booking Element LookUp'.'Order Service LookUp'.Service
